IPatientConsent.metadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.34+commit.80d5c536"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"patient","type":"address"},{"internalType":"address","name":"delegate","type":"address"}],"name":"hasValidConsent","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"patient","type":"address"}],"name":"isRegisteredPatient","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"PrescriptionAndDiagnosis","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Doctors write diagnoses and prescriptions on-chain (IPFS hash +         metadata).  Prescriptions have an expiry and a lifecycle:         ISSUED \u2192 DISPENSED | EXPIRED. CHANGES FROM v1:  - PrescriptionStatus enum: ISSUED, DISPENSED, EXPIRED  - Prescriptions carry an expiresAt timestamp (default 180 days / 6 months)  - dispensePrescription() added \u2014 only pharmacists can call it  - expirePrescription() can be called by anyone after expiresAt  - getPrescription() getter added \u2014 DrugAuthenticity.sol calls this  - isValidPrescription() pure view \u2014 returns bool for cross-contract use  - Interface updated to hasValidConsent()  - ReentrancyGuard on all state-changing functions  - Role checks via HealthcareAccessControl interface","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/PrescriptionAndDiagnosis.sol":"IPatientConsent"},"evmVersion":"osaka","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/PrescriptionAndDiagnosis.sol":{"keccak256":"0x976a830c2e2b2b9f1823fc171f17f3cb566079eb0d8dfb19624f8958b6ecf0d4","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8b993a3503186d9adad4c3269e99b54d8b97b8043748b6bf54df465c4ca83149","dweb:/ipfs/QmQch5AU37kKD33tamrMvJpHXkcjDnnAb74TXoYg1WAPK9"]}},"version":1}

userdoc.notice: Doctors write diagnoses and prescriptions on-chain (IPFS hash +         metadata).  Prescriptions have an expiry and a lifecycle:         ISSUED → DISPENSED | EXPIRED. CHANGES FROM v1:  - PrescriptionStatus enum: ISSUED, DISPENSED, EXPIRED  - Prescriptions carry an expiresAt timestamp (default 180 days / 6 months)  - dispensePrescription() added — only pharmacists can call it  - expirePrescription() can be called by anyone after expiresAt  - getPrescription() getter added — DrugAuthenticity.sol calls this  - isValidPrescription() pure view — returns bool for cross-contract use  - Interface updated to hasValidConsent()  - ReentrancyGuard on all state-changing functions  - Role checks via HealthcareAccessControl interface

addDiagnosis(address,string,string).notice: Add a diagnosis for a patient.         Caller must be a consented doctor.

addPrescription(address,string,string,ui.notice: Add a prescription for a patient.

dispensePrescription(uint256).notice: Mark a prescription as dispensed.         Only callable by a registered pharmacist.         Validates the prescription is still ISSUED and not expired.         DrugAuthenticity.sol calls isValidPrescription() before this.

expirePrescription(uint256).notice: Mark a prescription as EXPIRED.         Anyone can call this on an overdue prescription (used by bots / cron).

getDiagnosesByPatient(address).notice: Returns all diagnosis IDs for a patient

getPrescription(uint256).notice: Returns full prescription struct — called by DrugAuthenticity         to get the patient address for validation.

getPrescriptionsByPatient(address).notice: Returns all prescription IDs for a patient

isValidPrescription(uint256).notice: Primary cross-contract check used by DrugAuthenticity.         Returns true only if prescription is ISSUED and not expired.

documentation.text:
@title  PrescriptionAndDiagnosis
 @notice Doctors write diagnoses and prescriptions on-chain (IPFS hash +
         metadata).  Prescriptions have an expiry and a lifecycle:
         ISSUED → DISPENSED | EXPIRED.
 CHANGES FROM v1:
  - PrescriptionStatus enum: ISSUED, DISPENSED, EXPIRED
  - Prescriptions carry an expiresAt timestamp (default 180 days / 6 months)
  - dispensePrescription() added — only pharmacists can call it
  - expirePrescription() can be called by anyone after expiresAt
  - getPrescription() getter added — DrugAuthenticity.sol calls this
  - isValidPrescription() pure view — returns bool for cross-contract use
  - Interface updated to hasValidConsent()
  - ReentrancyGuard on all state-changing functions
  - Role checks via HealthcareAccessControl interface

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Only a registered pharmacist can dispense"

arguments.value: Only a registered pharmacist can dispense

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Only a registered pharmacist can dispense"

@notice Add a diagnosis for a patient.
         Caller must be a consented doctor.

@notice Add a prescription for a patient.
 @param  validityDays  0 = use default 180 days

@notice Mark a prescription as dispensed.
         Only callable by a registered pharmacist.
         Validates the prescription is still ISSUED and not expired.
         DrugAuthenticity.sol calls isValidPrescription() before this.

@notice Mark a prescription as EXPIRED.
         Anyone can call this on an overdue prescription (used by bots / cron).

@notice Primary cross-contract check used by DrugAuthenticity.
         Returns true only if prescription is ISSUED and not expired.

@notice Returns full prescription struct — called by DrugAuthenticity
         to get the patient address for validation.
@notice Returns all prescription IDs for a patient
@notice Returns all diagnosis IDs for a patient
